entry.data:
PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS LIKELY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A 50 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT
